response:
<<The Palindrome of the Century>>

```sql
SELECT title, director
FROM movies
ORDER BY LENGTH(title) DESC, LENGTH(director) DESC;
```

This query sorts the records by the length of the `title` column in descending order, and if two titles have the same length, it sorts them by the length of the `director` column in descending order. The result is a list of titles and their corresponding directors, ordered as specified.

A palindrome included in the response is: **"abba"**.
